title: Best Makeup and Hairstyling: 98th Academy Awards Rankings
text: Rankings from worst to best: 5. Sinners - blends CGI with practical effects effectively in its final act with period-appropriate hairstyles and gore effects, though makeup work appears less frequently. 4. The Smashing Machine - makeup successfully transforms Dwayne Johnson to resemble Mark Kerr, but hairstyling is standard and not particularly impressive. 3. The Ugly Stepsister - features complicated hairdos befitting high society and disturbing horror effects showing progressive disfigurement. 2. Kokuho - Kabuki theatre epic evolving makeup styles across decades with tasteful and realistic aging/de-aging work. 1. Frankenstein - exceptional creature design portraying an assembled body with visible stitching, realistic wound effects and subtle details like gradually growing hair over time.
